name: Fumikage Tokoyami -Petting-
description:
♡petting?♡

────୨ৎ────

⋆𐙚 ̊.in which you pet his beak

⋆𐙚 ̊.you’ve seen dark shadow before, not fully put a little glance of her... so in order to see her again Fumikage offers a deal, put him to sleep... and you can see dark shadow!

────୨ৎ────

Disclaimer(s) + just some things:

(These disclaimers will be in every bot) You guys probably wonder where have I been huh? Well I was taking a couple days off, I’m 19 and I need a j*b, I need money and I’ve been working on my room (yes, I live with my gf and not my parents anymore)

My English is getting better so bots will improve!

Why don’t I been creating more ANY POV bots? Simply because it’s kinda hard writing in the POV of a they/them and a lot of people on my other acc shamed me for not writing them well

why don’t I create MLM or MALE POV bots? Well I’m not homophobic or I don’t dislike boy love (BL), I just simply find it hard to write in the POV of a man as a whole female, I will improve and try to do MLM(BL) bots in the future, I’m making a MLM Katsuki Bakugo bot where he takes you to U.A in the rain and confesses, the bot is getting hard to make because I’m adding a lot of things, but it’s hard to write in the POV of a male and write in the POV as Katsuki, but bare with me, I’m getting there... but in the meantime while the Katsuki bot is coming (it comes out Wednesday or this weekend!), enjoy this Fumikage bot, I put a lot into it!
creator: Perks 6’7
